allow: Bash(awk 'BEGIN{minx=9999;maxx=-9999;minz=9999;maxz=-9999} {if\($1<minx\)minx=$1; if\($1>maxx\)maxx=$1; if\($3<minz\)minz=$3; if\($3>maxz\)maxz=$3} END{print "X:", minx, "to", maxx; print "Z:", minz, "to", maxz}')

Bash(awk 'BEGIN{minx=9999;maxx=-9999;miny=9999;maxy=-9999;minz=9999;maxz=-9999} {if\($1<minx\)minx=$1;if\($1>maxx\)maxx=$1;if\($2<miny\)miny=$2;if\($2>maxy\)maxy=$2;if\($3<minz\)minz=$3;if\($3>maxz\)maxz=$3} END{print "X:", minx, maxx, "size:", maxx-minx; print "Y:", miny, maxy, "size:", maxy-miny; print "Z:", minz, maxz, "size:", maxz-minz}')
